## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and the reason for it.

## Validation

- [ ] Built locally
- [ ] Tested locally

## CodeRabbit

Use these in PR comments when needed:

- `@coderabbitai review` for an incremental re-review
- `@coderabbitai full review` for a full PR review
- `@coderabbitai summary` to refresh the PR summary
- `@coderabbitai resolve` to resolve prior CodeRabbit comments
